summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 Label/Sticker Generation module. All core functionality working correctly including auto-generation, print logging, reprint with mandatory reason, bulk operations, and print history tracking.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay occasionally intercepts pointer events preventing tab clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Use keyboard navigation (Escape key) to close dialogs

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Backend API - Auto-generation of labels when GRN is saved
Backend API - All required label fields present (Material Code, Description, Batch, GRN Number, Quantity, UOM, Receipt Date, Bin Location, QR code)
Backend API - Reprint with mandatory reason validation
Frontend UI - Login and navigate to Labels page
Frontend UI - Labels display with all required information
Frontend UI - Reprint button with mandatory reason field
Frontend UI - Create Label form with all fields
Frontend UI - Label preview with QR code and barcode
Integration - Print count tracking and display
